title: ContextAssemblyTrace
description: Audit trace of how context was assembled for a prompt. Never stores raw text.

decision_ref.description: Reference to the ContextBudgetDecision that governs this trace

parts.description: Ordered list of context parts considered for inclusion

estimated_input_tokens.description: Sum of estimated_tokens for all included parts

reserved_output_tokens.description: Tokens reserved in the context window for the model response

truncated_parts.description: source_types that were added but not included (truncated/blocked)

source_ref.description: Short reference identifier — never the full text

included.description: Whether this part was included in the final prompt

blocked_reason.description: Reason code if this part was not included

content_hash.description: First 16 hex chars of SHA-256 of the content, for deduplication
